name: Double-Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease 12 muffin-pan cups.
In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, salt, and ground red pepper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together milk, butter, and egg. Stir into dry ingredients just until combined.
Stir in corn. Spoon batter into prepared pans.
Bake 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Unmold and serve warm.
Yield: 1 dozen
Per muffin: Calories 175 / Fat 6g (Saturated 3g) / Cholesterol 33mg / Sodium 318mg / Carbohydrates 27g / Protein 4g
